# Effective Claude Code Usage

This is the well-known discovery copy for agentic assistants.

Canonical slides: https://www.indrapatil.com/effective-claude-code-usage/
Root llms.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/effective-claude-code-usage/llms.txt
Root llms-full.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/effective-claude-code-usage/llms-full.txt
Source: https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/effective-claude-code-usage/

Summary: A Quarto RevealJS presentation on using Claude Code effectively as a CLI agent for software engineering. The deck covers tool use, skills, workflows, context management, CLAUDE.md, subagents, planning mode, hooks, prompting, MCP, and Git worktrees.
